name: Triple Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 package instant chocolate pudding mix (3.9 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding according to package directions.
2. Whisk in the cake mix.
3. Stir in the chocolate chips.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
6. Dust with powdered sugar.
7. Serve with ice cream, if desired.
